column2: Verify CAA Approval of Practical Flight Training
column3: ['Check the entity has submitted its exposition to the CAA. ', 'Review the information provided by the entity regarding facilities, working conditions, equipment, tools, processes, personnel, organization and coordination. ', "Determine if the entity's facilities, working conditions, equipment, tools, processes, personnel, organization and coordination meet RAE(PC) scheme requirements. ", 'Grant approval for practical flight training to the entity. ']
column4: ["The submission confirmation is visible on the CAA's system. ", 'All relevant details are present in the submitted exposition. ', 'The CAA has reviewed and determined that the entity meets all necessary requirements for practical flight training under the RAE(PC) scheme. ', 'A formal approval document is issued by the CAA, allowing the entity to conduct practical flight training. ']
